title: Immune Cell Isolation from Mouse Spleen
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"40qkr","text":"To isolate immune cells from a mouse spleen before sorting ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"hiR8A","text":"MATERIALS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":null,"data":null},{"key":"1321S","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":null},{"key":"dtuH2","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":null}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"","data":{"id":49896,"guid":"4137642B341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"EZ-LINE Cell strainer, 70um Nylon PP, 50 per case","mol_weight":0,"sku":"SP104181.SIZE.1CS","url":"https://www.biobasic.com/us/ez-line-cell-strainer-70um-nylon-pp-50-per-case","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":120,"name":"Bio Basic Inc.","link":"http://biobasic.com/","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}},"1":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"","data":{"id":124735,"guid":"419E2F76341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"10% FBS RPMI","mol_weight":0,"sku":"","url":"","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":1,"name":"Contributed by users","link":"https://www.protocols.io","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/1.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/1.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}}}}
steps: Prepare 50mL of 10% FBS RPMI media undetermined, FBS undetermined, RMPI **other media may be used
Wet both sides of a 70μm filter with media above a 50mL conical (make sure there is some media in the conical)
Place spleen on filter, use the plunger base of a syringe to mash the spleen on to the filter while pouring media through
Continue pouring media through filter while mashing until spleen is completely mashed. About 30 to 35mL of media should be used undetermined
Keep suspended cells on ice in the 10% FBS RPMI media until preparing for sort
Spin cells down at 350g for 3 min (pulse to 550g if necessary)
Resuspend pellet in 1mL of ACK lysing buffer for 1 min on ice 00:01:00
Add 30mL of media, spin down at 350g for 3 min (pulse to 550g if necessary) **if pellet is still red, another round of ACK might be needed undetermined
Stain with desired antibodies, filter with sorting filters, dilute if large pellet
creator: Grace Burgin
